uncovered_forms_documented: InstallmentPlanForm - requires active enrollment with payment setup
PasswordChangeForm - Django built-in, tested via profile

role_coverage.denial_mechanism: URL-prefix routing: /panel/admin/ vs /panel/teacher/ etc. Unauthorized roles get 404 (no matching URL), not 403.
